name: Three Alemanas
preceding_figure_names: Advanced Hip Twists,Closed Hip Twist,Curl,Fan,Hockey Stick,Open Hip Twist,Opening Out From Reverse Top,Progressive Walks Forward,Spiral,Spot or Switch Turn to L (Lady to R),Three Threes
following_figure_names: Circular Hip Twists,Continuous Hip Twists,Advanced Hip Twists,Sliding Doors,Rope Spinning,Spiral,Closed Hip Twist,Natural Opening Out Movement,Cuban Rock LF,Side Step To Right,Side Step To Left,Hand To Hand RSP,New York LSP,Basic Movements: Closed,Basic Movements: Open,Fan,Opening Out To Right And Left
notes: There are a lot of turns/twists. Step onto foot, axis moved to the new standing foot, turn/twist around axis (shoulder first, hip follows), release free hip, move to new axis and start over. One coach's imagery: rotisserie chicken on a skewer. The axis/skewer does not change, shift, break or move. chicken rotates around skewer.

steps.action: LF forward and slightly leftwards, no turn
Close RF to LF in RSP, slight body turn to right
comments: Slight body turn to the right.

steps.action: LF to side with partial weight, slight body turn to left returning to normal position
comments: Turn body slightly to the left.

steps.action: Transfer weight to RF, no turn
Close LF to RF, no turn indicated
comments: Close left foot to right foot.

steps.action: Repeat Alemana pattern (steps 4-6 of Alemana), raise left hand above lady's right shoulder, circle counter‑clockwise
comments: Raise left hand above lady's right shoulder.
